vocab.meaning: chi một khoản tiền lớn (thường là miễn cưỡng)
vocab.example: I occasionally shell out for designer boots because I know the craftsmanship justifies the steep price.

vocab.meaning: vung tiền, chi tiêu hoang phí vào một thứ xa xỉ
vocab.example: On my birthday, I decided to splash out on a pair of high-end running shoes I’d been eyeing for months.

vocab.meaning: trở nên nổi bật, gây chú ý
vocab.example: I gravitate towards big-name brands because their unique designs help me stand out from the crowd.

vocab.meaning: thử đồ (giày, quần áo) xem có vừa không
vocab.example: I prefer visiting physical stores to try on branded footwear, as sizes can vary significantly between labels.

vocab.meaning: vẫn còn tốt, bền bỉ sau một thời gian sử dụng
vocab.example: I’ve found that premium sneakers really hold up well even after a year of daily use.

vocab.meaning: từ bỏ, bỏ lỡ (một cơ hội hoặc lời đề nghị)
vocab.example: When I saw those limited-edition shoes at half price, it was an offer I simply couldn't pass up.

vocab.meaning: phối hợp tốt, hợp với (quần áo/phong cách)
vocab.example: I usually buy minimalist branded shoes because they go with almost any outfit in my wardrobe.
I happened to stumble across a boutique outlet selling authentic luxury brands at a fraction of the cost.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ cho, đáp ứng nhu cầu của
vocab.example: Famous brands often cater to professional athletes, ensuring their shoes provide maximum support.
Buying from well-known labels is an easy way for me to keep up with the latest footwear trends.
